title: Reusable Photo
sourceTitle: Coin Counting Photo Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable photo edit coin count with photo-edit composition that keeps realistic counting context, clear object separation, and documentary lighting. Modify this photo so the total adds up to 244.5 baht. Adjust the number of coins in each stack until the combined value hits the target. photo-edit task. coin stack arithmetic target Currency Target: 244.5 Thai baht total. Coin Stack. Layout: several neat stacks of Thai coins arranged on the same tabletop as the reference photo. Photo Edit Rule: add or remove only coins, preserving camera angle, table texture, shadows, and photo realism. Counting Visibility: each stack must be countable from the visible coin edges and top coins. Lighting Style: natural room light with soft shadows matching the original image. Accuracy Note: the visible denomination mix must add up exactly to 244.5 baht. Subject: Make several neat stacks of Thai coins arranged on the same tabletop as the reference photo the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the same tabletop and camera angle from the reference photo with only the coins edited. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use add or remove only coins, preserving camera angle, table texture, shadows, and photo realism. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in realistic photo edit that preserves exposure, shadows, table texture, lens angle, and original image noise. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use natural metal coin tones and the original photo color balance. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

imagePrompts.title: Coin Counting Photo Edit Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable photo edit coin count with photo-edit composition that keeps realistic counting context, clear object separation, and documentary lighting. Modify this photo so the total adds up to 244.5 baht. Adjust the number of coins in each stack until the combined value hits the target. photo-edit task. coin stack arithmetic target Currency Target: 188.75 Thai baht total. Coin Stack. Layout: mixed coin piles grouped by denomination with a few flat coins beside the stacks. Photo Edit Rule: keep the original photo background and edit only the number and placement of coins. Counting Visibility: make coin values legible enough that the total can be audited. Lighting Style: same exposure, white balance, and shadow direction as the source photo. Accuracy Note: the final arrangement must visibly support the stated target total. Subject: Make mixed coin piles grouped by denomination with a few flat coins beside the stacks the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the same tabletop and camera angle from the reference photo with only the coins edited. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use keep the original photo background and edit only the number and placement of coins. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in realistic photo edit that preserves exposure, shadows, table texture, lens angle, and original image noise. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use natural metal coin tones and the original photo color balance. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
